markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Zapier to improve Zapier's templates ecosystem with programmatic content generation](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered workflow engine that can create high-quality, fact-checked content at scale, with the ability to generate both programmatic templates and editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Zapier's current templates need improvement: legacy templates (350k+) don't showcase Zapier's full capabilities for complex systems, and there are challenges with template visualization and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Key success metrics would be creating JSON blobs for templates programmatically while identifying market signals to inform which templates to prioritize](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
  - [Next step is an 8-week strategy sprint to deeply understand the problem space and develop actionable solutions](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [GrowthX built an "AI workflow as code engine" - essentially a coding agent that writes workflows for expert-led processes](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [System includes built-in fact-checking, research verification, and quality controls](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Capable of processing both editorial (70% of engagements) and programmatic content (30%)](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Different from tools like Aerobs by being purpose-built with better scalability (tens of millions of parallel runs)](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Workflows generate outputs in JSON format that can feed directly into customer systems](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### Zapier Templates Problem Space

  - [Legacy templates (350k+) only showcase simple one-to-one connections, not Zapier's capabilities for complex systems](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Templates need to compete with offerings from NAN, TINES, and MAKE that better showcase complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Key bottleneck: creating JSON blobs for templates is time-consuming and requires technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Templates exist in multiple forms: Zap templates (legacy), rich templates (new products), and agent templates](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
  - [Zapier team recently overcame some pricing and packaging friction points, now focusing on template quality](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Visual Storytelling Challenge

  - [Danny highlighted a crucial gap: Zapier lacks strong visual components that showcase workflow/system capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Competitors like N\&N have screenshots that make users "look smart" and get shared widely on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Templates need to make creators proud to share them - current visuals don't tell a compelling story](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Marcel suggested incremental approach: improve content first, then test visual enhancements on high-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1978.0)

### Distribution Strategy

  - [Current templates described as a "cul-de-sac versus a billboard" - need better distribution to internet](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [GrowthX has experience with newsletters (using Beehive for better deliverability) and social monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Danielle's hypothesis: identify market signals → use existing system data → create templates → distribute](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
  - [Marcel suggested analyzing session data to find patterns of user needs and conversions to prioritize template creation](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Zapier team will share sample JSON blobs (simple, complex, and medium) for GrowthX to understand requirements](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
  - [GrowthX confirmed ability to programmatically generate JSON based on defined structures](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Implementation would require specific API access and understanding Zapier's technical requirements](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [GrowthX offers full-stack execution including design and engineering resources to minimize bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Zapier team to reconvene internally and follow up through Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Marcel/Tyler to send details on the 8-week strategy sprint structure](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)
  - [Danielle to share sample JSON blobs of varying complexity for GrowthX to analyze](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2530.0)
  - [Kaveh to handle contract and procurement for the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)
  - [Scope defined as primarily rich templates within ZSL realm (Zap templates considered out of scope)](https://fathom.video/share/v5HoqsKWPQmkz4p3Ykw5Lz3vZ1X_Nhfd?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
